upload_hint: Or drag and drop files here
bulk_intro_title: Send multiple signing requests at one time!
bulk_intro_1: Step1. Download the auto-generated blank .csv file.
bulk_intro_2: Step2. Fill the .csv file with the signers' information. You can send 100 requests maximum.
bulk_intro_4: Step4. Review the list and send in bulk.
bulk_added_title: Signing requests are ready to be sent!
bulk_added_desc: Please click 'Continue' to send the requests.
bulk_error_title: Hold on, something’s wrong with your list...
bulk_error_desc: signing requests has been found on your list, but there's something that needs to be fixed. Please check your file with the following highlights and re-upload the .csv file:
bulk_null_desc: No request found. Please check your file and try again.
envelope_files_upload_hint: Each uploaded document will create a separate task within the envelope.
envelope_manage_signers_tip: All tasks within the envelope are assigned to the same signer and must be signed in order.
public_form_manage_signers_tip: Anyone who obtains the form link and signs it will be considered a form signer.
form_desc_tip: Displayed on the form for signers to view.
